name_cn:
SPEEDY BANDOULIÈRE 25 Handbag #️⃣M41113
Exclusive global launch! This item is custom-made according to Chanel's French boutique specifications with dynamic chip code changing. Original boutique fabric, original boutique light gold electroplated full steel hardware (color consistent with authentic)
Please compare with the authentic French version!
We ensure 100% restoration of the authentic feel! Exclusive original factory fabric, hardware, edge oil, stitching + authentic craftsmanship, latest official website gift box!
25 x 19 x 15 cm
(Length x Height x Width)
Monogram coated canvas
Calfskin trim
Fabric lining
Hardware
Double zippers
Padlock
Interior slip pocket
Spacious enough to hold a 7.9-inch tablet, card holder, lipstick, and other daily essentials
Strap: Removable, adjustable
Strap half-length: 46.5 cm
Strap half-length adjustable to: 55.0 cm
Handles: Double handles
Made in France
